name: RussFeingold.com
subject: fifteen
disclaimer_text: paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Joe Sensenbrenner, Madison, WI, Treasurer
body:
There are now FIFTEEN dark-money groups pouring millions into Wisconsin to support Senator Johnson. | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4607/1c469400/1b7e08e/3540cc6/4118467863/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-cob?utm_source=ema_2016-10-17_SC_ND-rs&refcode=ema_2016-10-17_SC_ND-rs&utm_campaign=COB&utm_medium=ema") Friend, We often talk about Senator Ron Johnson having the support of 12 right-wing groups. Well, as of this weekend, there are now __fifteen__ right-wing groups pouring millions into Wisconsin in a desperate attempt to keep Senator Johnson in Washington. **Y'all, this is RIDICULOUS.** We're fighting back as hard as we can -- _but we're getting outspent_. And with the polls as close as they are, we can't slow down for one second. **Tomor row night at midnight, we close the books on the last reporting period before Election Day. It's the final time we can demonstrate the true strength of this grassroots campaign. [We need to raise $250,000 to reach our goal. Contribute $5 to help us fight back.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4607/1c469400/1b7e08e/3540cc6/4118467863/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-cob?utm_source=ema_2016-10-17_SC_ND-rs&refcode=ema_2016-10-17_SC_ND-rs&utm_campaign=COB&utm_medium=ema")** [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4607/1c469400/1b7e08e/3540cc6/4118467863/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-cob?utm_source=ema_2016-10-17_SC_ND-rs&refcode=ema_2016-10-17_SC_ND-rs&utm_campaign=COB&utm_medium=ema") [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4607/1c469400/1b7e08e/3540cc6/4118467863/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-cob?utm_source=ema_2016-10-17_SC_ND-rs&refcode=ema_2016-10-17_SC_ND-rs&utm_campaign=COB&utm_medium=ema") _Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4607/1c469400/1b7e08e/3540cc7/4118467863/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-cob?utm_source=ema_2016-10-17_SC_ND-rs&refcode=ema_2016-10-17_SC_ND-rs&utm_campaign=COB&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=5")

This type of spending is RIDICULOUS, but the Supreme Court's lawless _Citizens United_ decision of 2010 made it completely legal. These groups can spend as much as they want, and some don't even have to disclose who their donors are.
We'll never spend as much as these fifteen right-wing groups -- but, we don't have to. **Because this grassroots, people-powered campaign has the momentum it's going to take to win.[Chip in $5 right now to make sure we hit our $250,000 goal by midnight tomorrow.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4607/1c469400/1b7e08e/3540cc6/4118467863/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-cob?utm_source=ema_2016-10-17_SC_ND-rs&refcode=ema_2016-10-17_SC_ND-rs&utm_campaign=COB&utm_medium=ema")**
Thanks for standing with Russ.
Best,
Shelby Cole
Email Director

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Bryant?=
subject: Dishonest attacks on Bryant
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Washingtonians for Bryant (R)
body:
| | |
---
[View this email in your browser](http://us13.campaign-archive1.com/?u=a508ffc703e6fc82360a383e8&id=58af0b4f8e&e=32f1a3df98)
---
| |
---
| | Friend

The hypocrisy of Team Inslee is staggering. Yesterday, Inslee boosters released a blatantly false ad making untrue claims about Bill – claims that would be completely true if you switched out “Bill Bryant” for “Jay Inslee.”

**The ad is paid for by groups that Jay Inslee has met with behind closed doors to negotiate contracts – the pinnacle of cronyism and corruption in our state.**

The fact that they’re spending so much money on false negative ads means only one thing – they know how vulnerable Inslee is. **They’re panicking because they can see their 32-year stronghold slipping away.**

We have an opportunity that we can’t pass up. **[Help us respond by contributing $35, $65, $100, or more to Bill’s campaign right away.](http://billbryantforgovernor.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=a508ffc703e6fc82360a383e8&id=57002bc38b&e=32f1a3df98)**

Thank you for your support. We can’t do this without you.

**Jason Roe**
Senior Advisor
Bill Bryant for Governor
(253)220-5051

name: Evan Bayh
subject: Just got off the stage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Evan Bayh Committee, 133 W
body:
| [ ](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a50597/7be36b49/1e6daee1/78f9f1c6/3677205488/VEsH/ "http://www.evanbayhforindiana.com/")
---
Friend,

You've had my back throughout this campaign, and I want to thank you for it. I've never felt your support more than during my debate with Congressman Todd Young.

**Tonight, I made a point to stand up for Hoosier values, working families, and bipartisan solutions -- just as I 'll do as your senator. **My vision for Indiana is one in which our country is safe from threats, good jobs are plentiful, and retirement is secure.

Congressman Young seems to have some different ideas about what we should prioritize, ideas that I think are wrong for Indiana. I'm committed to spending the next three weeks showing Hoosiers why my vision for our state and our country is the better one.

**Friend, I hope I made you proud tonight. Now it 's up to us to take this campaign across the finish line together. [Will you chip in $5 to help us win?](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a50597/7be36b49/1e6daee1/78f9f1c5/3677205488/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bayh-email?refcode=20161018.3nd&amount=10")**

Thank you,

Evan ********[Contribute](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a50597/7be36b49/1e6daee1/78f9f1c4/3677205488/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bayh-email?refcode=20161018.3nd&amount=25")********
Paid for by the Evan Bayh Committee, 133 W. Market Street #153, Indianapolis, IN 46204

* * *

dpwillis67@gmail.com

name: BernieSanders.com
subject: Yuuuge
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers: Since earlier today, 10,000 people have donated more than $400,000 to Catherine Cortez Masto, Deborah Ross, Maggie Hassan, and Katie McGinty.
That's how much people want Paul Ryan's warning about Bernie Sanders becoming chair of the budget committee to become true.
**What you're doing for these candidates is yuuuge.** It's game-changing for their campaigns. But there's still more to do, because we can do more than just take back the Senate. We have a chance to take back the House. It starts with helping candidates for Congress who are inspired by the political revolution.
So we're going to set an audacious goal that we don't know is possible to hit by tomorrow night's final FEC fundraising deadline - but it's one that is very important to try to reach.
[**Let's raise $1 million for candidates for the House and Senate by tomorrow's final FEC fundraising deadline of the campaign. Split a $3 contribution between Deborah Ross, Zephyr Teachout, Nanette Barragan, Tom Nelson, Pramila Jayapal, Rick Nolan, and Morgan Carroll.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/take-back-congress?refcode=em161018-full-s "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/take-back-congress?refcode=em161018-full-s")
[](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/take-back-congress?refcode=em161018-full-s "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/take-back-congress?refcode=em161018-full-s")
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/take-back-congress?refcode=em161018-full-s "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/take-back-congress?refcode=em161018-full-s")**
Adding a contribution to these candidates - even if you've already supported them - is so important right now. Every poll shows these races within a handful of percentage points. And every contribution you make to these candidates will go to the critical work of communicating with voters and organizing for Election Day.
We don't know if we can reach $1 million for House and Senate candidates tomorrow. But it's very important that we try.
Adding a contribution to these candidates - even if you've already supported them - is so important right now. Every poll shows these races within a handful of percentage points. And every contribution you make to these candidates will go to the critical work of communicating with voters and organizing for Election Day.
We don't know if we can reach $1 million for House and Senate candidates tomorrow. But it's very important that we try.
[**If you can, add a $3 contribution to reach our goal.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/take-back-congress?refcode=em161018-full-s "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/take-back-congress?refcode=em161018-full-s")
Thank you,
Jeff Weaver
Team Bernie

Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders
PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/").

We don't know if we can reach $1 million for House and Senate candidates tomorrow. But it's very important that we try. "" Thank you, Jeff Weaver Team Bernie Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402

name: Leigh K. Warren, EMILY's List
subject: [FEC deadline] Is your name on the record?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILY's List [www
body:
| [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c0aed/24c69fd9/edb4532/18ea87aa/3620919003/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WPEFEV46N_digital_email_20161018_LastRecord_n-all&source=WPEFEV46N_digital_email_20161018_LastRecord_n-all")
---

| | Hi there,

Tomorrow is our last FEC deadline before Election Day. This is a big one, and people will be watching.

It's the last time this election cycle that we file a concrete list showing the power of this community, and the more names we have on there, the better.

We've set an aggressive goal -- $200,000 -- but I know we can hit it.

**[Donate $3 now to help hit our goal and be a part of the final push to flip the Senate, elect Hillary as president, and clean up the House.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c0aed/24c69fd9/edb4532/18ea87a5/3620919003/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161016_email_FECdeadline?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4+-+Donate+3+now+to+help+hit+our+goal+and+be&utm_campaign=WPEFEV46N_digital_email_20161018_LastRecord_n-all&source=WPEFEV46N_digital_email_20161018_LastRecord_n-all")**

Our candidates across the country are counting on us, and we know that this final FEC report is one of our last chances to make sure they know we're with them.

Be on the official record to say you helped flip the Senate and elect our first woman president, and send a message that we'll never allow a candidate like Donald Trump again.

**Donate $3 before midnight tomorrow to help crush our last FEC deadline goal:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Hit-Our-Wednesday-Goal](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c0aed/24c69fd9/edb4532/18ea87a6/3620919003/VEsD/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161016_email_FECdeadline?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=5+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgHitOurWednesdayG&utm_campaign=WPEFEV46N_digital_email_20161018_LastRecord_n-all&source=WPEFEV46N_digital_email_20161018_LastRecord_n-all")**

Thank you,

Leigh K. Warren
Chief Administrative Officer, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c0aed/24c69fd9/edb4532/18ea87a7/3620919003/VEsA/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161016_email_FECdeadline?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=6&utm_campaign=WPEFEV46N_digital_email_20161018_LastRecord_n-all&source=WPEFEV46N_digital_email_20161018_LastRecord_n-all")

|
---|---|---

subject: I know it's late (very quick)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Everyone's watching to see if Democrats can take on the Koch brothers and defeat the GOP's obstruction-happy majority before the last FEC deadline of the election... [****](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab?refcode=DPE-20161018-Matt_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
---

| [](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab?refcode=DPE-20161018-Matt_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
---
Friend -- I had to check in with the **last FEC deadline of the election** just 24 hours away.

Each time we've faced a make-or-break moment like this, our grassroots has met it -- $1 at a time. **But right now, we 're coming up short on our projections.**

[**So I 'm asking you to close the gap quickly, Friend. Will you rush a gift to the DSCC with the Senate majority (for years!) at stake?**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab?refcode=DPE-20161018-Matt_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

The Kochs are spending millions to save the GOP's majority and continue their unprecedented Supreme Court obstruction -- and if we don't fight back in this critical moment, that's _exactly_ what will happen.

**Friend, we 're counting on every grassroots Democrat to respond. With just three weeks until Election Day, will you pitch in ASAP to stop the Kochs and take back the Senate?**

**[Pitch in $1 IMMEDIATELY>>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab?refcode=DPE-20161018-Matt_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=1")

[Pitch in $15 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab?refcode=DPE-20161018-Matt_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=15")

[Pitch in $25 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab?refcode=DPE-20161018-Matt_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=25")

[Pitch in $35 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab?refcode=DPE-20161018-Matt_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=35")

[Or donate another amount.](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab?refcode=DPE-20161018-Matt_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**

Don't let GOP dark money rescue Mitch McConnell's majority. [**Let 's give this last FEC deadline everything we've got >>**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab?refcode=DPE-20161018-Matt_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Thanks,
Matt Kehres
Digital Director, DSCC

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954eb72/2b07114c/77a67661/73befbb2/3195060080/VEsHAw/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

Together, we're going to take back the Senate in November, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954eb72/2b07114c/77a67661/73befbac/3195060080/VEsHDQ/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.

name: Eric Trump
subject: The race depends on tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
Get your name on the list I hand my father before his FINAL debate. |
* * *
Please find a special message from one of our advertisers, Trump Make America Great Again Committee.
* * *
---
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38213406:sZeytQuNa:m:1:876315805:EA02E6FF2AE56F1C648C21D8B7006E86:r)
Peter,

My father is truly honored and humbled by the grassroots support that powers our campaign.

During the second debate, he even took a moment to praise and thank the hard-working men and women who've made generous contributions to our campaign. He called attention to our average contribution of $61.

That's why I always make it a point to show my father a list of supporters who made a contribution just before his debates against Hillary.

And this time, the debate falls on our FINAL FEC deadline of the entire campaign. When I give him the list tonight, I'd love to also be able to tell him that we already hit our fundraising goal BEFORE he even sets foot on the debate stage.

[**Please contribute $100, $65, $35, $20, $15, or even $3 before 8 pm EST tonight to help us CRUSH our goal before the FEC deadline, and you 'll get your name on the list of supporters I give him before he takes the stage.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38213406:sZeytQuNa:m:1:876315805:EA02E6FF2AE56F1C648C21D8B7006E86:r)

My father loves our small-dollar machine, because it perfectly represents our movement.

Our movement is powered by the hard-working American men and women that have been abandoned by our politicians for decades.

While Hillary calls you deplorable, my father calls you a patriot.

And tonight, he's going to make that simple fact clear to EVERY SINGLE VOTER across America. Hillary represents the corrupt, stale status quo that has contempt for the hard-working Americans that make this country run.

Our campaign is a movement OF, FOR, and BY the PEOPLE.

[**Now please make a contribution of whatever you can before 8 pm EST tonight.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38213406:sZeytQuNa:m:1:876315805:EA02E6FF2AE56F1C648C21D8B7006E86:r)

Thank you,

Eric Trump
**[CONTRIBUTE NOW](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38213406:sZeytQuNa:m:1:876315805:EA02E6FF2AE56F1C648C21D8B7006E86:r)** | Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.
---

name: Brad =?UTF-8?Q?Johnson=2C=20VoteClimate?=
subject: Join Al Gore in Supporting Climate Champions
body:
|
---
[](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/sJLWK/6/6i/r5cs/6FbIz9/zIY8rhbkEf) [**Add your name to the #VoteClimate pledge:**](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/sJLWK/s/6d/r5cs/6FbIz9/GOVjFbrTa) _" I will vote only for climate champions who support a 100% clean energy future, and an end to taxpayer support of fossil fuels."_ Activist -- Al Gore spoke out on Tuesday at a Florida rally with Hillary Clinton about what's truly important in this election: _" The first message is: The climate crisis is, and must be recognized as, a top national priority. Now here's the second message: your vote really, really counts."_ Gore knows personally how important it is to vote, and to vote climate. I'm sure you do too. **[Click here to pledge to vote climate.](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/sJLWK/v/6T/r5cs/6FbIz9/8n7VMH4XU)** Polls show that the majority of Americans care about climate change, and with every disaster more and more of us are quite correctly alarmed. Meanwhile, the percent of Americans who deny climate change is shrinking - but they still hold power in the halls of Congress. How do we change that? The answer is simple: we need to build political power for the climate movement. Politicians won't notice us until we show up at the ballot box to vote climate: Stand for comprehensive action to address global warming, and climate voters will put you in office. Stand in the way of progress, and we'll send you packing. Imagine, for a moment, how the world might be different had Al Gore prevailed in Florida 16 years ago. Then stop imagining, and start to change the world. We have the resources to address the climate crisis - we simply lack the political might to take down polluter power. Please join the nationwide #VoteClimate coalition to start building our own power. [Pledge to #VoteClimate in this and every election.](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/sJLWK/z/6T/r5cs/6FbIz9/6VXbqBsSw8) Yours, Brad Johnson
Executive Director
Climate Hawks Vote P.S. It wasn't just Gore. Here's what Hillary Clinton said: _" Climate change needs to be a voting issue. We need to elect people up and down the ballot at every level of government who take it seriously and are willing to roll up their sleeves and get something done. Please, we cannot keep sending climate deniers and defeatists to Congress or statehouses and certainly not to the White House."_ If you agree, [take the #VoteClimate pledge](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/sJLWK/U/6T/r5cs/6FbIz9/6Wc01yjton).

If you wish to stop receiving our emails or change your subscription options, please [Manage Your Subscription](http://democrats.ontraport.com/u/OTg0MjAvMC8xOTM2Njk2LzAvNzgvMC82ZDJiNTMxZjI0MjMwNWVmMGVhN2M0MTI4NmQzMzcxZS8zNjYxMTA1Ng==)
Democrats.com, Box 1452, New York, NY 10276

name: Newt Gingrich
subject: Speaker Pelosi
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Ryan, a joint fundraising committee authorized
body: This is the most important email I will send. As it stands, Nancy Pelosi is in prime position to do serious damage to our historic House majority on Election Day. She already has millions of dollars in attack ads against our conservative candidates. That spending doesn't reflect the extra help they'll get from the liberal media -- don't get me started on that... If we don't have a strong showing for the last FEC Deadline of the election tonight, we could lose everything we have worked so hard to achieve--even our Republican majorities. Peter -- I'm asking you to step up for this crucial deadline. Without you, we could very well lose the last line of defense for conservative values in America. I wouldn't ask you to step up alone. So if you step up today, I will gladly TRIPLE-MATCH any contribution you make to the last FEC deadline of this election. name: Eric Trump
subject: The race depends on tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint
body:
Peter,

My father is truly honored and humbled by the grassroots support
that powers our campaign.

During the second debate, he even took a moment to praise and
thank the hard-working men and women who've made generous
contributions to our campaign. He called attention to our average
contribution of $61.

That's why I always make it a point to show my father a list of
supporters who made a contribution just before his debates
against Hillary.

And this time, the debate falls on our FINAL FEC deadline of the
entire campaign. When I give him the list tonight, I'd love to
also be able to tell him that we already hit our fundraising goal
BEFORE he even sets foot on the debate stage.

Please contribute $100, $65, $35, $20, $15, or even $3 before 8
pm EST tonight to help us CRUSH our goal before the FEC deadline,
and you'll get your name on the list of supporters I give him
before he takes the stage.
http://email.vervemail.com/ct/49276800:JO2OBbmaN:m:3:1516426255:E42BB475A4CC27335EA8AEB363DB6990:r

My father loves our small-dollar machine, because it perfectly
represents our movement.

Our movement is powered by the hard-working American men and
women that have been abandoned by our politicians for decades.

While Hillary calls you deplorable, my father calls you a
patriot.

And tonight, he's going to make that simple fact clear to EVERY
SINGLE VOTER across America. Hillary represents the corrupt,
stale status quo that has contempt for the hard-working Americans
that make this country run.

Our campaign is a movement OF, FOR, and BY the PEOPLE.

Now please make a contribution of whatever you can before 8 pm
EST tonight.
http://email.vervemail.com/ct/49276800:JO2OBbmaN:m:3:1516426255:E42BB475A4CC27335EA8AEB363DB6990:r

Thank you,

Eric Trump
http://email.vervemail.com/ct/49276800:JO2OBbmaN:m:3:1516426255:E42BB475A4CC27335EA8AEB363DB6990:r

name: =?UTF-8?Q?Donald=20J=2E=20Trump?=
subject: our debate tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
Will you show the country you’re still fighting? |

Friend, Either we win this election on November 8 -- or we lose our country. I want you to know that we will end this election with a FIGHT. So before my final debate with Hillary Clinton TONIGHT, I’m calling on you to take a stand and officially join the fight to save our country. We recently reported that our campaign has enlisted more individual donors than ANY campaign in Republican politics. With your help right now, we can take that record to the next level by setting a new fundraising record for the most individual donors in American political history. Please make a contribution of ANY amount -- $100, $50, $25, $5, or $1 -- to help us set a record in American political history before the FINAL FEC-mandated deadline. This is the FINAL FEC deadline of the entire election. And because it’s so critical, my son, Eric, will be presenting me with a list of every supporter who helped us before the deadline. This is our last chance to send a powerful message that Hillary’s special interest and lobbyist machine are NO MATCH for the grassroots of America. And what better way to do it than by showing that more individual Americans contributed to our campaign than to ANY other in American political history. Friend: now please step up before the FINAL FEC deadline -- the night of our final debate against Crooked Hillary Clinton. Please make a contribution of $100, $50, $25 to help us set a record in American political history before the FINAL FEC-mandated deadline. Thank you, Donald J. Trump
CONTRIBUTE $100

name: Trey Gowdy
subject: we can't afford to fall behind
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Trey Gowdy for Congress
body:
Peter, our nation's future is on the line in November, and the choices we make will determine the kind of country we want our children to live in. | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/38230709:sfIsKsuWN:m:1:1320601823:07011F54C9DF6FF3F55E0AAD47EB7E15:r)
---
Peter,

Asking for money is my least favorite thing to do, but as one of my closest supporters, I couldn't afford to not get in touch with you immediately.

Peter, I need your help.

We're racing against the deadline to meet our October fundraising goals -- **and right now, it looks like we're going to come up short.**

| [** DONATE TODAY
HELP TREY GOWDY>>**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/38230709:sfIsKsuWN:m:1:1320601823:07011F54C9DF6FF3F55E0AAD47EB7E15:r)
---

Peter, we can't afford to fall behind. The funds that we raise this month will go towards the crucial get-out-the-vote efforts that will determine the outcome of this election.

If you're able, [**please chip in whatever you can to make sure that we don't fall behind.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/38230709:sfIsKsuWN:m:1:1320601823:07011F54C9DF6FF3F55E0AAD47EB7E15:r)

Reaching out to voters is the most important and expensive part of any campaign and I need your help to make sure that my campaign doesn't fall behind.

I'm focused on putting Washington back to work, holding lawmakers accountable, and upholding my promise to put the safety and security of South Carolinians -- _and all Americans_ -- first.

[** DONATE TODAY
HELP TREY GOWDY>>**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/38230709:sfIsKsuWN:m:1:1320601823:07011F54C9DF6FF3F55E0AAD47EB7E15:r)

Our nation's future is on the line in November, and the choices we make will determine the kind of country we want our children to live in.

[ **I hope that I can count on your help today.** ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/38230709:sfIsKsuWN:m:1:1320601823:07011F54C9DF6FF3F55E0AAD47EB7E15:r)

Sincerely,

Trey Gowdy
South Carolina 4th District

name: John Kasich
subject: A personal favor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich
body:
I'll level with you - we are dangerously close to losing our
majority in the U.S. Senate.

Peter, I'll level with you - we
are dangerously close to losing our majority in the U.S. Senate.

If Hillary wins and she manages
to pick up just four Senate seats, she'll be able to appoint
anybody she wants to the U.S. Supreme Court. That's what's at
stake.

But we can eliminate any chance
of this happening by ensuring that we hold our majority and win
these key Senate races.

As a personal favor to me, please
consider chipping in with $10, $25, $50 or more right now to help
the National Republican Senatorial Committee raise the funds they
need to get out the vote and win!

I've been traveling around the
nation to help our congressional candidates raise money and would
appreciate having your support.

Peter, we're just weeks away
from Election Day and some states have already started early
voting. Now is our chance to secure victory for our Republicans
and hold the majority!

Thank you for all that you're
doing to help.

-John

John Kasich
Governor of Ohio

Paid for by Kasich
for America
www.JohnKasich.com

body:
In just 20 days, Hoosiers all across the state will head to the polls and decide who we want to represent us - and fight for us - as our next governor | | | | | | | [](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/c010d4a4526c4d30aabca9e1d09f19f1?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&_m=b5b9fd930b264f31bea5af4d256b6f52&utm_source=Iterable&utm_medium=Image_Header_Logo&utm_term=Fundraising_Deadline&utm_campaign=EOM&utm_content=20161019-its-today-16266-direct) |

| | | | Friend, **In just 20 days, Hoosiers all across the state will head to the polls and decide who we want to represent us - and fight for us - as our next governor.** **[If you’re ready for Eric Holcomb’s strong conservative leadership, show your support today.](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/f8ac63a385084ab2846f9de72fedd2f5?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&_m=b5b9fd930b264f31bea5af4d256b6f52&utm_source=Iterable&utm_medium=text_body_cta_1&utm_term=Fundraising_Deadline&utm_campaign=eom&utm_content=20161019-its-today-16266-direct)** We close the books on our 2016 Statewide Candidate Quarterly Report in just FIVE DAYS, so **[if there has ever been a time to chip in and help our cause, it’s not next month or next week — it’s TODAY.](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/8f73701495d0428fb2aded208f8ce7a2?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&_m=b5b9fd930b264f31bea5af4d256b6f52&utm_source=Iterable&utm_medium=text_body_cta_2&utm_term=Fundraising_Deadline&utm_campaign=eom&utm_content=20161019-its-today-16266-direct)** **[Monday’s deadline](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/bc50fd8933d8470fa279d131ca1d9721?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&_m=b5b9fd930b264f31bea5af4d256b6f52&utm_source=Iterable&utm_medium=text_body_cta_3&utm_term=Fundraising_Deadline&utm_campaign=eom&utm_content=20161019-its-today-16266-direct)** will determine what we can accomplish in our final days and hours of this campaign, and in a neck-and-neck race like ours, every dollar makes a difference. **[We set a goal to raise $50,000 ahead of Monday night’s deadline to guarantee our Final-Days Fund is fully stocked, so we’re really counting on your support.](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/648ae7d4196d4af2995d27199aeb1901?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&_m=b5b9fd930b264f31bea5af4d256b6f52&utm_source=Iterable&utm_medium=text_body_cta_4&utm_term=Fundraising_Deadline&utm_campaign=eom&utm_content=20161019-its-today-16266-direct)** If we fail to meet our goal, our opponents will see it just days before Election Day. It’s never been so important to come together and show the Indiana Democrats how strong Team Holcomb is and how ready we are to win! **[Become a Final Days Fund Donor TODAY to help strengthen our momentum and WIN the Hoosier State for Eric – and for us!](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/18eded84580d459f9fadf85f826a1196?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&_m=b5b9fd930b264f31bea5af4d256b6f52&utm_source=Iterable&utm_medium=text_body_cta_5&utm_term=Fundraising_Deadline&utm_campaign=eom&utm_content=20161019-its-today-16266-direct)**

name: Amy Lunde, Greg for Montana
subject: An integrity problem
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greg for Montana, PO
body:
Greg for Montana

Let's restore accountability to Helena

Steve Bullock misused the
taxpayer funded airplane. He gave rigged contracts to friends.
He destroyed public records. And now, Steve Bullock has used
hush money to pay off whistleblowers to the tune of $900,000!

It's time we bring accountability back to state government.

The OGA is also intended to
reduce excessive regulations and agency practices that inhibit
job growth. Read about Greg's plan:

Moratorium on New Regulatory
Rulemaking
Identify and Eliminate
Excessive or Redundant Spending and Regulation
Establish Customer Service
Metrics for Each State Agency Interfacing with The Public
Review Agency Practices &
Contracts
Selling the State Plane
Commit to Open & Transparent
Government

Will you stand with Greg? Steve
Bullock has abused your tax dollars for too long.

Let's restore accountability and
send Greg Gianforte to Helena!

Sincerely,

Amy Lunde

Greg for Montana

subject: Who do you want to serve in a Trump-Pence administration?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Give your suggestions for Mr. Trump. |

Friend, who would you like to see serve in President Trump’s cabinet? We’re surveying our strongest supporters on who they’d like to see on the team that helps Trump Make America Great Again! Please take the President Trump Administration Survey to give your preference on who Donald Trump should appoint to cabinet-level positions. Donald Trump worked with conservative leaders to compile a list of 21 names of potential Supreme Court justices to replace the late Justice Scalia. And now he’s turning to leaders within our movement to help him develop a list of candidates to serve in his administration. This is your chance to have a say in the process. Please take the President Trump Administration Survey to give your preference on who Donald Trump should appoint to cabinet-level positions. Thanks, Sharon Day Co-Chair Republican National Committee BEGIN SURVEY

name: Karl Rove
subject: The state of the election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
|

Fellow Conservative,

The House is up for grabs.

**I won't tiptoe around it - Nancy Pelosi is positioned to make serious gains on Nov. 8th.**

With only 20 days left to Election Day -- **[we need everyone to step up today.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/38234399:WuSPzsuNA:m:1:1405944196:4E848E3BE13667E46C427A0305A5177E:r)**

It's our duty as conservatives to stand as the last line of defense for our values until the final moment of this important battle.

Pelosi and the Democrats are heading into the campaign's final days with a $16.8 million advantage.

**[Please, will you come off the sidelines NOW, before the election's final FEC deadline?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/38234399:WuSPzsuNA:m:1:1405944196:4E848E3BE13667E46C427A0305A5177E:r)**

Republicans cannot win this critical contest without your support.

**Will you stand against Nancy Pelosi and Hillary Clinton by taking action before the entire election's most important fundraising deadline?**

**[EXPRESS SEND YOUR $25 GIFT>>>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/38234399:WuSPzsuNA:m:1:1405944196:4E848E3BE13667E46C427A0305A5177E:r)**

**[EXPRESS SEND YOUR $50 GIFT>>>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/38234399:WuSPzsuNA:m:1:1405944196:4E848E3BE13667E46C427A0305A5177E:r)**

**[EXPRESS SEND YOUR $75 GIFT>>>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/38234399:WuSPzsuNA:m:1:1405944196:4E848E3BE13667E46C427A0305A5177E:r)**

**[EXPRESS SEND YOUR $100 GIFT>>>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/38234399:WuSPzsuNA:m:1:1405944196:4E848E3BE13667E46C427A0305A5177E:r)**

**Or pitch in another amount via this secure link:[https://contribute.nrcc.org/defeat-liberals/](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/38234399:WuSPzsuNA:m:1:1405944196:4E848E3BE13667E46C427A0305A5177E:r)**

**ALL GIFTS WILL BE TRIPLE-MATCHED UNTIL MIDNIGHT TONIGHT.**
Fellow Conservative, **you're the only thing standing between Pelosi and the Speaker's Chair.**

Without your immediate support, Hillary will have a Pelosi-led Congress to rubber stamp her liberal agenda.

Thank you for everything you do,

Karl Rove

**_P.S._** The election's last FEC deadline is tonight and we are only 20 days away from Election Day.

Please join this battle today at: **[https://contribute.nrcc.org/defeat-liberals/](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/38234399:WuSPzsuNA:m:1:1405944196:4E848E3BE13667E46C427A0305A5177E:r)**

name: Sarah Silverman for RussFeingold.com
subject: Lemme tell you a couple truths
disclaimer_text: paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Joe Sensenbrenner, Madison, WI, Treasurer
body:
I have a few things to say about the Senate race in Wisconsin. | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4601/1c469400/1bd3cbf/3540d6e/2842039973/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-cob?utm_source=ema_2016-10-19_Sarah_ND&refcode=ema_2016-10-19_Sarah_ND&utm_campaign=COB&utm_medium=ema") Hi Angels! It's your friend, Sarah Silverman. Lemme tell you a couple truths: Russ Feingold is one of the very few totally righteous politicians who has always voted on the right side of history. Even when, at the time, it was unpopular. He has that kind of foresight and vision -- and we need him in the Senate. Plus, he's running against Senator Ron Johnson, who is a Trump supporter. STILL. Need I say more? I do?? Okay: Senator Johnson is a bought-and-paid-for Tea Party shill who has spent the past five years voting consistently in support of big corporations, and against middle-class and working families. If Senator Johnson doesn't want to listen to Wisconsinites, he doesn't deserve to represent them. So let's get him out of office. **Help to unseat this guy and replace him with an honest-to-goodness progressive rockstar, Russ Feingold.[Donate $5 today to Russ's campaign and let's get Senator Johnson out of office.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4601/1c469400/1bd3cbf/3540d6e/2842039973/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-cob?utm_source=ema_2016-10-19_Sarah_ND&refcode=ema_2016-10-19_Sarah_ND&utm_campaign=COB&utm_medium=ema")** [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4601/1c469400/1bd3cbf/3540d6e/2842039973/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-cob?utm_source=ema_2016-10-19_Sarah_ND&refcode=ema_2016-10-19_Sarah_ND&utm_campaign=COB&utm_medium=ema") [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4601/1c469400/1bd3cbf/3540d6e/2842039973/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-cob?utm_source=ema_2016-10-19_Sarah_ND&refcode=ema_2016-10-19_Sarah_ND&utm_campaign=COB&utm_medium=ema") _Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4601/1c469400/1bd3cbf/3540d6f/2842039973/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-cob?utm_source=ema_2016-10-19_Sarah_ND&refcode=ema_2016-10-19_Sarah_ND&utm_campaign=COB&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=5")

name: MaggieHassan.com
subject: as tight as they come (and I really hate to lose)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdb8b/2a380d31/17f1287c/fc6349/1987263517/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdb8b/2a380d31/17f1287c/fc6349/1987263517/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
I really hate to lose, team.
But our race here in New Hampshire is practically guaranteed to decide Senate control and the future of the Supreme Court, and poll after poll shows that thanks to support from Ayotte's corporate special interest backers, Governor Hassan is locked in a dead heat with Washington Republican Kelly Ayotte.
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdb8b/2a380d31/17f1287c/fc634a/1987263517/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMDE5X0ZFQy1NUEdfdjIiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20161019_FEC-MPG_v2&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")
The LAST FEC fundraising deadline before the election is tonight and if we're going to move these polls in our favor before Election Day, we HAVE to raise $75,000 by midnight.
**Our records indicate that you may be able to help us get there with a $3 donation. So, I'm asking you directly:[Give $3 or more before the midnight deadline so that together we can help Maggie take the lead in the polls, win back the Senate, and secure the future of the Supreme Court.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdb8b/2a380d31/17f1287c/fc634a/1987263517/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMDE5X0ZFQy1NUEdfdjIiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20161019_FEC-MPG_v2&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
**[Click to donate $3.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdb8b/2a380d31/17f1287c/fc634b/1987263517/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMDE5X0ZFQy1NUEdfdjIiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVVGeWNtRjVRU0I5ZlE9PSI6IjMifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20161019_FEC-MPG_v2&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=3")**
**[Click to donate $25.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdb8b/2a380d31/17f1287c/fc63b4/1987263517/VEsA/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMDE5X0ZFQy1NUEdfdjIiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVVGeWNtRjVRaUI5ZlE9PSI6IjI1In0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20161019_FEC-MPG_v2&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=25")**
**[Click to donate $50.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdb8b/2a380d31/17f1287c/fc63b5/1987263517/VEsB/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMDE5X0ZFQy1NUEdfdjIiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVVGeWNtRjVReUI5ZlE9PSI6IjUwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20161019_FEC-MPG_v2&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=50")**
**[Or click here to donate another amount.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdb8b/2a380d31/17f1287c/fc634a/1987263517/VEsO/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMDE5X0ZFQy1NUEdfdjIiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20161019_FEC-MPG_v2&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**
Look, this race is as tight as they come, so we're 100% serious when we tell you that your gift right now could be the difference between winning here in New Hampshire and handing the Senate to Washington Republicans. I don't know about you, but I don't want to wake up on November 9th wishing we had done more.
Please, donate $3 -- every dollar you can -- here: **[http://maggiehassan.com/FEC-deadline](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdb8b/2a380d31/17f1287c/fc634a/1987263517/VEsP/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMDE5X0ZFQy1NUEdfdjIiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20161019_FEC-MPG_v2&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**
Thanks for being a team player,
Marc Goldberg
Campaign Manager, Maggie for NH

[Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdb8b/2a380d31/17f1287c/fc634a/1987263517/VEsHBQ/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMDE5X0ZFQy1NUEdfdjIiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20161019_FEC-MPG_v2&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")

subject: Trump’s message for you before the debate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
Eric Trump is compiling a list of all of our supporters who stepped up before the deadline tonight to make a contribution. |
[](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/eckbaUU7BADHTuBT8OoaGKL6DRMN6aaaaGKL6BMAPKXta?k=A@s-xAsG&U=nf6YvbsiEx_qckYv.Syc&v=c&7=&h=~q~z~wIVoSITtjIlsToeIYxXIZpSIjIjIXp0o&jIj)

Friend,

Mr. Trump is ready to deliver another win for the American people tonight.

But before he gets up on that stage to fight for you, he's recorded an important video.

[**Watch Mr. Trump 's video here. >>**](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/eckbaUU7BADHTuBT8OoaGKL6DRMN6aaaaGKL6BMAPKXta?k=A@s-xAsG&U=nf6YvbsiEx_qckYv.Syc&v=d&7=&h=~q~z~wIVoSITtjIlsToeIYxXIZpSIjIjIXp0o&jIj)

[](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/eckbaUU7BADHTuBT8OoaGKL6DRMN6aaaaGKL6BMAPKXta?k=A@s-xAsG&U=nf6YvbsiEx_qckYv.Syc&v=e&7=&h=~q~z~wIVoSITtjIlsToeIYxXIZpSIjIjIXp0o&jIj)

**Tonight 's debate is also the FINAL FEC deadline of the entire election.**

name: Corry Bliss
subject: help us contact 150,000 voters in a SINGLE day
body:
| Peter \--

This Saturday, we're holding our October Super Saturday day of grassroots action and launching our "Countdown to Victory" RV Tour! Rob and Jane will travel across Ohio and meet with volunteers and interns this weekend. We've set a goal of contacting 150,000 voters in a single day as we march towards our goal of contacting 5 million targeted voters during the course of our campaign.

**Have you RSVPed for Super Saturday?**
[
](https://www.robportman.com/super_saturday_october?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=oct_ss&n=1)
Since May of last year, our incredible volunteers and interns have contacted more than 4.6 _MILLION_ voters. This weekend, we'll have special guests, including Congressmen and statewide elected officials, at all of our offices. Over the summer, we had over 500 interns knocking on doors and making phone calls across our 12 field offices. We're organized on 36 college campuses, and we've launched 7 coalitions over the past year and a half. Join us this weekend for Super Saturday! **[Click here to RSVP](https://www.robportman.com/super_saturday_october?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=oct_ss&n=2)**.

We'll be on the lookout for you as we spend the final three weeks of this campaign traveling across Ohio on our "Countdown to Victory" RV Tour! Sincerely, Corry Bliss [](https://www.robportman.com/donate?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=oct_ss&n=3 "Donate here!") [](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=oct_ss&n=4)[](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=oct_ss&n=5)

---
-=-=-
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www.robportman.com/unsubscribe?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=oct_ss&n=6). -=-=-

name: Team Katie
subject: [Breaking Poll] PA Senate race TIED
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
Hey -- there isn't much time, so I'll keep this quick.

At midnight, we face our **_final FEC fundraising deadline_** before the election -- and it couldn't come at a more critical time. A breaking field poll from the _Washington Post/Survey Monkey_ shows the Pennsylvania senate race is in a ***_complete tie_ ***.

[**Hurry, there are less than three weeks left to win this race. Pitch in $5 or more before the midnight FEC deadline to help put Katie into the lead >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-1891178545443504128/1734756669746839552?refcode=e20161019&refcode2=e20161019nd&amount=25)

| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/-1891178545443504128/1734756669746839552?refcode=e20161019&refcode2=e20161019nd&amount=25)
---
**[Urgent: Donate Now>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/-1891178545443504128/1734756669746839552?refcode=e20161019&refcode2=e20161019nd&amount=25)**
Look, if we don't move the needle in the next 20 short days, we're looking at a __coin toss__ -- one that will almost certainly swing control of the Senate AND the next Supreme Court justice.

[**We 're in the final sprint, and it's anyone's game. Chip in $5 or more now >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-1891178545443504128/1734756669746839552?refcode=e20161019&refcode2=e20161019nd&amount=25)

[**www.katiemcginty.com/home-stretch**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-1891178545443504128/1734756669746839552?refcode=e20161019&refcode2=e20161019nd&amount=25)

It's everything or nothing --

Team Katie

| *** A note on donations ***

There are only 20 days left in this race, and the polls are in a virtual tie. Katie is fighting for working families in PA -- but we're up against major special interest spending. Can you make a grassroots donation today to help Katie win this race and take back the Senate?
**Chip in $5 today. Thank you.**

**[Donate Now](https://act.myngp.com/el/-1891178545443504128/1734756669746839552?refcode=e20161019&refcode2=e20161019nd&amount=25)**
---

name: Lisa Bullock
subject: Why Montana is so special to us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Steve Bullock - Democrat, P
body:
---
Friend,

When Steve and I were in high school together at Helena High, Montana was a wonderful place to grow up. It still is.

Today, because of the opportunities Steve and I had here, our family has the honor of serving our great state. **[Will you contribute $15 to help make sure he's reelected?](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=tFFgQ78I6%2F67o8r0Rq8RWE82ndo3boPH)**

What made Montana so special for me and Steve when we were kids are the same things we want to pass on to our three children -- **good public schools, fair taxes for working families, access to public lands and the belief in economic opportunity for everyone.**

Let's make sure it stays this way. This race is close. And right now there is a lot of big money being spent to distort Steve's record.

**Steve and I are so thankful for the support we 've received throughout this campaign but now it's going to come down to the next 20 days. [Will you contribute $15?](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=hxbGk8150pCpOFG4UWo502kYbbxCFjOg)**

Thanks,

Lisa Bullock ****
---
| [**DONATE**](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=ZjjtoAakGUYdYW5DIVLzOU82ndo3boPH)
---
| Paid for by Friends of Steve Bullock - Democrat, P.O. Box 1330, Helena, MT 59624
---

If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=WNgGpbWYwv3yaH2x%2FJlUlk82ndo3boPH).

Friends of Steve Bullock
Post Office Box 1330
Helena MT 59624 United States

| This is big, guys. Yesterday the _Sun Sentinel_ reported: **" If Murphy upsets Rubio, it could clinch the Senate for Democrats."** This confirms that Senate control is riding on us. And our chances keep improving! In a new Quinnipiac poll yesterday, we're down by a "scant" 2 points, within the margin of error. We have them running scared. [**Can you contribute now to help us capitalize on this momentum?**](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2da3/738133e4/328966de/7f85628a/2236983023/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme161019?refcode=pme161019_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=25")

We know just how critical Florida is to control of the Senate, and we know we can win this thing.

_Guess who else knows?_ Marco Rubio, Mitch McConnell, and the Koch brothers.

They're outspending us by nearly three to one, plastering the airwaves with lying attack ads and doing everything they can to try to shut down Patrick.**But get this --_it 's not working._**

We're right on Rubio's tail. Tonight is our LAST FEC filing deadline before election day, and we've got to make it count. **Can you chip in $5 now to help us meet our goal, defeat Marco Rubio, and retake the Senate for Democrats?** | [](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2da3/738133e4/328966de/7f85628b/2236983023/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme161019?refcode=pme161019_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=3")

name: Justice for Governor
subject: A Tale of Two Polls
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Justice for Governor
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-4826979621649643520/-3934877737033529344?refcode=home)
**New independent polling shows Jim Justice holds a commanding double-digit lead over Bill Cole! **
**West Virginians continue to rally around Jim to transform our state. **

The MetroNews West Virginia Poll released today shows Jim with a double-digit lead - closely matching the polling results we shared on Monday.

Senate President Bill Cole continues to run his campaign on bogus lies. Bogus Bill has been caught trying to mislead West Virginians on the campaign trail again and again.

Here is a short list of bogus whoppers from Bill Cole:
* Cole tried to push another bogus whopper by claiming his own poll shows the race for governor a dead heat. NOT TRUE! We now have two credible pollsters in just a week showing Cole trailing by a wide margin. In fact, EVERY real poll in this race has shown Jim Justice with a sizeable lead.

* Cole put on a [campaign flyer](https://act.myngp.com/el/-4826979621649643520/-3862820142995601408) that he passed a balanced budget without raising taxes. That was a bogus claim because Cole did vote for the final budget that did raise taxes.

* Bogus Bill was [caught lying](https://act.myngp.com/el/-4826979621649643520/-3790762548957673472) about how much he got paid while the Legislature is in session. Bill Cole made an additional $5,100 (not counting expenses) during the 17-day special session and didn't want voters to know it.

* Cole promised not to fundraise during the session. In January, he flew to California to do some hob-knobbing with the Koch Brothers at [donor meetings](https://act.myngp.com/el/-4826979621649643520/-3718704954919745536) to raise out-of-state money. Cole held numerous fundraisers during the special session on the budget.

Bogus Bill is a typical politician who will say anything to get elected. [Click here to learn more about Bogus Bill.](https://act.myngp.com/el/-4826979621649643520/-3646647360881817600)

On To Victory,
Team Justice

subject: Will you join us Saturday?

body:
If you've missed out in the past, don't miss out on this one. We're holding another big day of action this Saturday.
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/8433870580654409728/-2205495480123258880?utm_campaign=fld_1025da_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&refcode=em16_161019_fld_gq_1025da_ful__pj)

name: Mike Weinholtz
subject: It’s time to do the right thing!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Weinholtz for Governor
body:
| | When I won the nomination for Democratic candidate for governor in April, I disclosed publicly that my wife was under investigation for medical cannabis.
---
| | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5194503036998579456/-424514849158788352?am=&recipientId=ENzs9AKZ1wqBssNbEIT6L&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com) Dear Peter, When I won the nomination for Democratic candidate for governor in April, I disclosed publicly that my wife was under investigation for medical cannabis. I made that decision because I believe deeply in transparency (if only more of our Utah elected officials did too!) Out of respect for the legal process and the investigation, I declined to speak to the press about my wife's situation or take a position on medical cannabis. Yesterday morning her case was resolved, and in that same spirit of transparency I called a press conference to address everything proactively. **[Click here to check out the full video:](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5194503036998579456/-352457255120860416)** [](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5194503036998579456/-352457255120860416) Did you know that:
* 1 in 3 adult Utahns has been prescribed opioids for pain relief? (Utah Dept. of Health)
* Since the year 2000, Utah has experienced a 400% increase in deaths from misuse and abuse of prescription drugs?
* 24 Utahns die each month from opioid overdose?

Utah has an opioid crisis, but our governor refuses to address it. Despite the wealth of medical and scientific research pointing to cannabis as a safe and healthy alternative to addictive opioids, our governor avoids the topic, claiming we need scientific research on it. **[Donate $20 to help elect a governor who will address urgent issues, not run from them!](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5194503036998579456/-424514849158788352?am=20&recipientId=ENzs9AKZ1wqBssNbEIT6L&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)** Yesterday, I officially declared my support for legalizing medical cannabis in Utah to challenge opioid abuse. Medical cannabis is now legal in 25 states, and those states have all seen dramatic decreases in opioid abuse. Besides curbing overdoses and death, it has given relief to millions of individuals and families struggling with chronic pain--without the risk of addictive opioids. When I asked my wife if she wanted to speak at yesterday's press conference to tell her story, her answer said it all: "I have to. We have to do this." This is about transparency but it's also about doing the right thing and fixing a broken law that is very literally killing innocent people in Utah. **[Chip in today if you agree that it's time for Utah to do the right thing!](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5194503036998579456/-424514849158788352?am=&recipientId=ENzs9AKZ1wqBssNbEIT6L&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)** Together with you,
Mike | Paid for by Mike Weinholtz for Governor

Mike for Utah
193 W. 2100 S.
South Salt Lake UT 84115 United States

clean_body: | | When I won the nomination for Democratic candidate for governor in April, I disclosed publicly that my wife was under investigation for medical cannabis. | | Dear Peter, When I won the nomination for Democratic candidate for governor in April, I disclosed publicly that my wife was under investigation for medical cannabis. I made that decision because I believe deeply in transparency (if only more of our Utah elected officials did too!) Out of respect for the legal process and the investigation, I declined to speak to the press about my wife's situation or take a position on medical cannabis. Yesterday morning her case was resolved, and in that same spirit of transparency I called a press conference to address everything proactively. Did you know that: 1 in 3 adult Utahns has been prescribed opioids for pain relief? (Utah Dept. of Health) Since the year 2000, Utah has experienced a 400% increase in deaths from misuse and abuse of prescription drugs? 24 Utahns die each month from opioid overdose? Utah has an opioid crisis, but our governor refuses to address it. Despite the wealth of medical and scientific research pointing to cannabis as a safe and healthy alternative to addictive opioids, our governor avoids the topic, claiming we need scientific research on it. Yesterday, I officially declared my support for legalizing medical cannabis in Utah to challenge opioid abuse. Medical cannabis is now legal in 25 states, and those states have all seen dramatic decreases in opioid abuse. Besides curbing overdoses and death, it has given relief to millions of individuals and families struggling with chronic pain--without the risk of addictive opioids. When I asked my wife if she wanted to speak at yesterday's press conference to tell her story, her answer said it all: "I have to. We have to do this." This is about transparency but it's also about doing the right thing and fixing a broken law that is very literally killing innocent people in Utah. ** Together with you, Mike | Paid for by Mike Weinholtz for Governor Mike for Utah 193 W. 2100 S. South Salt Lake UT 84115 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Samantha Gross, Chris Van Hollen for US Senate
subject: real change:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
...the most consequential election of our lifetime |
> Friend, did you see Chris' email? You and I know that he's the leader we need in the U.S. Senate, but he'll need your help to get there.
>
> **[Please chip in $25 or whatever you can before Wednesday's critical FEC deadline.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91a8f/70cdc2ba/472a577f/397bcb3/386545803/VEsH/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-keep-fighting?refcode=em101916&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Please+chip+in+25+or+whatever+you+can+be&utm_campaign=em101516_1&source=em101516_1")**
>
> _Begin forward message:_
>
> Friend,
>
> After more than a year of Donald Trump's poisonous rants, one thing is clear: This is the most consequential election of our lifetime.
>
> This November, when voters cast their ballots, they won't just be choosing their next leaders in the White House, the Senate and the House - they'll be choosing hope over fear, unity over division and tolerance over hate.
>
> Throughout my time in public office, I have worked hard to promote the values and priorities of our country, and advance the public interest over narrow special interests. I have always tried to bridge differences to build the common good. With your help, I hope to do that every day in the U.S. Senate.
>
> There are less than 24 days left in this campaign and we want to make sure we have the support of voters in every part of the state by election day. That means that we have to convince the over 20% of voters who all the polls show still remain undecided in this Senate race. To do that, we need to buy TV and radio time right now in order to get our message out. **[Friend thank you for anything you can chip in to help make sure our team has the resources to finish strong and win big for Maryland on November 8th.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91a8f/70cdc2ba/472a577f/397bcb0/386545803/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-keep-fighting?refcode=em101916&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Friend+thank+you+for+anything+you+can+ch&utm_campaign=em101516_1&source=em101516_1")**
>
> It means a lot to know we are in this fight together.
>
> Chris [Donate](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91a8f/70cdc2ba/472a577f/397bcb1/386545803/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-keep-fighting?refcode=em101916&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+Donate&utm_campaign=em101516_1&source=em101516_1")
>
---

Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---
We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. [**Click here**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91a8f/70cdc2ba/472a577f/397bb4e/386545803/VEsC/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=4+-+Click+here&utm_campaign=em101516_1&source=em101516_1") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages. Please enter dpwillis67@gmail.com to ensure that we are able to unsubscribe you from our list.

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: I hear you want me to have a gavel
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers,
I heard what Paul Ryan said about me: that if the Republicans lose the Senate, I will be the chairman of the Senate Budget Committee.
That sounds like a very good idea to me. It means that we can establish priorities for working people, and not just the billionaire class.
What would be equally exciting is if the Democrats took back the House, and Congressman Ryan was no longer Speaker. That would mean the clearest possible path to enact our agenda - the most progressive agenda of any party in American history.
In the last day, you have responded tremendously to our call to support four leaders who will help shift the balance of the Senate. More than 20,000 people have contributed more than $900,000 to ten candidates who are inspired by the political revolution.
During our campaign we pushed ourselves to reach goals that many thought impossible. That is why we set a very big, very audacious goal that we didn't know if we could reach, but that we thought it was very important to try. But you're about to smash that $1 million goal.
So, we're going to need a bigger goal.
[**Let's raise $2 million before tonight's final FEC deadline of the campaign for candidates for the House and Senate. Can you start with a $3 contribution between Paul Clements, Catherine Cortez-Masto, Deborah Ross, Zephyr Teachout, Morgan Carroll, Nanette Barragan, and Rick Nolan?**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/big-goals?refcode=em161019-full-s "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/big-goals?refcode=em161019-full-s")
[](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/big-goals?refcode=em161019-full-s "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/big-goals?refcode=em161019-full-s")
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/big-goals?refcode=em161019-full-s "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/big-goals?refcode=em161019-full-s")**
Consider for a moment the power that exists in the U.S. Senate. Right now, the Republican majority is using their power to block any meaningful action on addressing income inequality or climate change. In addition, without a Democratic majority the Senate is refusing to confirm federal judges and, incredibly, has left open a critical seat on the Supreme Court.
With a Democratic majority, we can change all of that. What Paul Ryan is specifically afraid of is the power of the budget committee. That committee defines the spending priorities of the entire government. The work of that committee says how much revenue the government should have, and where its money should go.
I have some thoughts on how the government should allocate its spending. I'm sure you do, too.
The first step to being able to enact our progressive agenda is taking back the Senate. And if we take back the House... well, the sky is the limit for what we can achieve.
[**Help us reach for our new, audacious goal of raising $2 million for candidates for the House and Senate by midnight tonight. Add a $3 contribution now split between Paul Clements, Catherine Cortez-Masto, Deborah Ross, Zephyr Teachout, Morgan Carroll, Nanette Barragan, and Rick Nolan.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/big-goals?refcode=em161019-full-s "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/big-goals?refcode=em161019-full-s")
Thank you for all you do.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders

Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders
PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/").

body:
No Republican has ever done this in history... |

Friend, Did you see this headline on Drudge? Trump Sets Republican Record for Individual Donors... More Americans have contributed to our campaign than to ANY Republican candidate in history. But with your help right now, we can take that record to the next level... Let’s beat the individual donor record not just for Republicans -- but for ALL political campaigns in American history. All I’m asking you to do is contribute any amount you can -- $1, $5, $25, $50, $100, $200 -- to help us set a new fundraising record for the most individual donors in American political history. But we need to do it before the FINAL FEC deadline of our ENTIRE campaign TONIGHT at 11:59 PM. Can I count on your contribution? Please make a contribution of $100, $50, or $25 to help us set a record in American political history before the FINAL FEC-mandated deadline. This is our last chance to send a powerful message that Hillary’s special interest and lobbyist machine are NO MATCH for the grassroots of America. And what better way to do it than by showing that more individual Americans contributed to our campaign than to ANY other in American political history. Please contribute before the FINAL FEC deadline of the ENTIRE election to help us set this ambitious record. Thanks, Katrina Pierson CONTRIBUTE $100

Dear Peter, You won't believe what just happened to me yesterday. The DC establishment is desperate to stop Donald Trump because they know he will end the party that they are having at our expense. The Louisiana establishment just sent this man to my home town to threaten me and tell me I was finished. I told them that you and I were going to finish them instead and make America Great Again.
---
[ ](https://u3600396.ct.sendgrid.net/wf/click?upn=Ept3eUXUTOqi1x3JGzXRbXaG3KX5kcffEdOsQijnjeP-2Bibd2V616-2BBsxozOmA3diPiJOc6jlwzbLF3Elwb6KLZtzTR3GOMzA-2BhyU9pnxstNCD-2FASF2anVtk-2FvT0YFWA4Pf-2F4UKTw20Lf-2F8JzA4dGAw-3D-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFCgEVvHZJIBnVwrwztgYJz0DCKsot10eGO4g1hWwNpsCOCBxq4llkdlSAzIFOJzxmAadmApQNdj5rMh2o5E-2FLyXIE2L7vwLyPBX-2FiRxLLARN55jRECso0hF8d4c8p-2FzhtV700x1ZcbcO-2FzmnUJEa7Tzkmtk-2Fg1KvKCfZkBt4DmYwUxijmtM2hzCWzgn1OgBJpMvLi4pEbaL-2FHupn-2BMyCJOE0192cyJ5-2BJtJM1XheqeTfBhT-2Bx3hIDrEiUdC9Wh-2BM9xrMwgye55ghgH4GBwneQIflpBRxKg50l3lfiDRYxIFhv4BiO8-2FmVK1wnu-2B6btpaDgfkn9Co85yV3QTbiNAfeDejN82CnFZLqnQ5EfQqzhdbqcWEp75SxbRlxMHca2GsZ9xh4Lw9iZKLlHRbhLj55H)
---
On Monday I got two quick back to back phone calls and a text from this man. I figured that he thought it was important to see me. He identified himself as a major person in funding Republicans in Louisiana and I recognized his name. We have received substantial new support in recent days due to our strong stand against the establishment and the coordinated attack on the Trump campaign. I was hopeful that we were about to get another supporter. But after we sat down to talk he told me that he ran the Super PAC for my Republican opponent John Fleming. **He told me that if I didn 't drop out of the US Senate race before last night's debate his powerful friends would make sure I was finished.** Then he told me that if I did what they wanted **they would buy me another political job with their Super PAC money**. My campaign manager was there so he immediately stood up and got his phone and took the guy's picture. We will file a criminal complaint as soon as our schedule allows it. We want to tell him and the establishment thugs he represents that with your help we are not finished but we will finish them and everything they represent, and we will take our country back! **We 're up against deep and corrupt pockets. We have less than 20 days until the election. clean_body: | | | | | Dear Peter, You won't believe what just happened to me yesterday. The DC establishment is desperate to stop Donald Trump because they know he will end the party that they are having at our expense. The Louisiana establishment just sent this man to my home town to threaten me and tell me I was finished. I told them that you and I were going to finish them instead and make America Great Again. On Monday I got two quick back to back phone calls and a text from this man. I figured that he thought it was important to see me. He identified himself as a major person in funding Republicans in Louisiana and I recognized his name. We have received substantial new support in recent days due to our strong stand against the establishment and the coordinated attack on the Trump campaign. I was hopeful that we were about to get another supporter. But after we sat down to talk he told me that he ran the Super PAC for my Republican opponent John Fleming. He told me that if I didn 't drop out of the US Senate race before last night's debate his powerful friends would make sure I was finished. Then he told me that if I did what they wanted they would buy me another political job with their Super PAC money. My campaign manager was there so he immediately stood up and got his phone and took the guy's picture. We will file a criminal complaint as soon as our schedule allows it. We want to tell him and the establishment thugs he represents that with your help we are not finished but we will finish them and everything they represent, and we will take our country back! We 're up against deep and corrupt pockets. We have less than 20 days until the election. Can you stop right now and make a? | Sincerely, Col. Rob Maness | | | | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF COLONEL ROB MANESS Friends of Colonel Rob Maness · United States

Read this --

Toomey won his seat in the last election by just 2% of the vote. If you do the math -- that's **_fewer than 9 votes per voting precinct._**

This race is going to be **__even closer__**. Just yesterday, a breaking _Washington Post/SurveyMonkey_ poll showed this race is in a **47% - 47% dead heat**.

[**Tonight is our *LAST FEC DEADLINE* before Election Day. Can you pitch in $5 or more to help us fight for every winning vote over the next 20 days? >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-2500844548905762816/3969386509852737536?refcode=e20161019.2&refcode2=e20161019.2nd&amount=25)

Our race will almost certainly decide control of the Senate AND the next Supreme Court justice. That's why Toomey's Wall Street allies are spending __millions__ to plaster the airwaves with attack ads -- and if we can't fight back now, we may never be able to make up the gap.

**It doesn 't get closer than this. [Chip in $5 or more to stand with Katie >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/-2500844548905762816/3969386509852737536?refcode=e20161019.2&refcode2=e20161019.2nd&amount=25)**

Everything is balancing on a knife's edge --

McGinty Polling Team

| *** A note on donations ***

There are only 20 days left in this race, and the polls are in a virtual tie. Katie is fighting for working families in PA -- but we're up against major special interest spending. Can you make a grassroots donation today to help Katie win this race and take back the Senate?
**Chip in $5 today. Thank you.**

\- WisPolitics, 10/17/2016

Yep, that's right: Reform America Fund is dropping $1.3 million in ads attacking Russ. But here's the deal, team: We can't afford to get tired, and we can't give up. **We have to fight back.**
[**And the quickest way to fight back is by reaching our grassroots goal by midn ight tonight. Tonight at midnight, we close the books on our FINAL reporting period of this campaign. Our compliance team will make sure all the i's are dotted and the t's are crossed -- then, we send the report to the Federal Election Commission for processing.
Like Russ said on Monday: Once we file, Senator Ron Johnson and all the right-wing groups in his corner will be able to see how strong our grassroots team truly is.
We can shock them -- but only if we reach our goal. And, as of right now, we're just over $35,000 away. [**Donate $5 right now to help us stay on track to meet our midn ight close-of-books goal.**](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4603/1c469400/1b87ac1/3540aa2/82232666/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-cob?utm_source=ema_2016-10-19_LKK_ND&refcode=ema_2016-10-19_LKK_ND&utm_campaign=COB&utm_medium=ema")

Best,
Lenee Kruse
Finance Director

subject: Phil Distinguished Himself As The Clear Leader
disclaimer_text: paid for by special interests
body:
| | |
---
[View this email in your browser](http://us13.campaign-archive2.com/?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=f8ecf76012&e=19cebfe173)
---
| |
---
| | | | | | [](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=15a3776620&e=19cebfe173) | [Share](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=6860e87f5f&e=19cebfe173)
