| | [](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=423d615c9b&e=19cebfe173) | [Tweet](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=c581041867&e=19cebfe173)
---|---
| | [](http://us13.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=f8ecf76012&e=19cebfe173) | [Forward to a Friend](http://us13.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=f8ecf76012&e=19cebfe173)
---|---
| Greetings,
---
| I hope you were watching the gubernatorial debate on WCAX last night. In case you missed it, here’s the recap: **Phil Scott distinguished himself as the clear leader**. He was passionate. He was focused. He laid out a vision for the future \- to get our economy back on track and grow good jobs. Most importantly, he was gubernatorial.

We are less than 20 days until polls close on Election Day November 8th and I’m asking for your support to help Phil get his message out. **Please consider the most generous donation you can TODAY!**
---
| [CLICK HERE TO DONATE TODAY!](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=d9919facb7&e=19cebfe173 "CLICK HERE TO DONATE TODAY!")
---
| There are thousands of undecided voters who will make up their minds in the coming weeks and we need to do all we can to negate the negative ads paid for by special interests. The campaign has been hard fought but it’s one we can be proud of. Phil’s message is one of compassion for the most vulnerable, support for women’s issues and a steadfast focus on the economy. After all, without good jobs for all Vermonters, our future is bleak.

After last night's debate, Dorothy and I are upping our support. We were so impressed with Phil and his message. With Phil’s leadership as governor, we have a fighting chance to get the state we love back on track and it’s too important not to double down now and do our part.

If you’ve given to Phil’s campaign already, thank you very much. Please give more if you can. If you haven’t given yet, **now is the time to give**.
---
| [CLICK HERE TO DONATE TODAY!](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=1e8c3078d5&e=19cebfe173 "CLICK HERE TO DONATE TODAY!")
---
| I know with your help, we’ll celebrate success on Election Day.

Governor Jim Douglas

| What an unbelievable week, team. We won our first debate against Marco Rubio. We crushed our mid-month fundraising goal. And then, a brand new _Quinnipiac_ poll showed we're catching up to Marco Rubio -- at 47% - 49%, this race is too close to call!

But it's not all good news -- our final FEC deadline of this election is tonight at midnight, and we still need to raise $12,465. [**Contribute right now to help us meet this goal >>**](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2da0/738133e4/328db78a/7f856239/2564822900/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme161019pm?refcode=pme161019pm_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=10")

My team tells me that so far, it's not looking very good. You guys have all been in this with me since the beginning -- but this is it. It's the very. last. one. [**Can you chip in now to help me out?**](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2da0/738133e4/328db78a/7f856239/2564822900/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme161019pm?refcode=pme161019pm_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=10")

Thanks for being on my team,
Patrick

name: Trey Nix, Team Cooper
subject: Last night
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
Last night's debate made it crystal clear that we cannot afford another term of Governor McCrory's destructive politics.
Last night's debate made it crystal clear that we cannot afford another term of Governor McCrory's destructive politics.
|
[](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/12025c1/2fde7c66/43382692/156adefa/2217174984/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cooper-dayafterfinaldebate?utm_campaign=fnd_postdb_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&refcode=em16_161019_fnd_gq_postdb_ful__tn&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")
---
Friends, Another debate, another momentum-building win for Roy. Now, in less than 24 hours, early voting begins across North Carolina. It's go time! **Our grassroots team is gearing up for our get-out-the-vote operation and we need your help. Can you chip in to help our team? name: =?utf-8?Q?Carter=20Gaffney?=
subject: We Need to Have Eric's Back
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greitens for Missouri, Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer
body:
Peter,
I served with Eric Greitens as a Navy SEAL. I watched Eric start and grow The Mission Continues to help thousands of veterans around the country. I can tell you one thing that I've learned about Eric through those experiences: he won't let anyone outwork him.
When Eric is fighting for something he believes in, he goes all in. Eric's had my back--in service and in life. I'm proud to have his back today on this new mission to take Missouri in a new direction.
Eric is up against the worst of the political class in Missouri. They will stop at nothing to keep him from shaking up the status quo. So I'm asking every one of you to [have Eric's back today](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=a09e964329&e=84041254e6).
**Let Eric Know: [I've Got Your Back](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage2.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=8edfb460cd&e=84041254e6)
[Sign Up to Volunteer Today](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=a1d6603f19&e=84041254e6)**
Hillary Clinton just announced that she's sending $500,000 to help get out the vote for her fellow career politician Chris Koster. If we're going to win this thing, we need everyone who can to [come help share Eric's message.](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=c2faccc965&e=84041254e6)

Volunteers all over the state are pitching in to [make calls](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=90fcf816a6&e=84041254e6), [knock doors](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=1885606050&e=84041254e6), and [stuff envelopes](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=1a5967c8d8&e=84041254e6) to help this grassroots campaign overcome the political machine in Missouri. I know Eric will outwork Chris Koster--but all of us need to outwork his special interest machine.
Let's win this thing together and put an end to politics as usual in Missouri.

On to Victory,

Carter Gaffney
Lieutenant, U.S. Navy SEAL
Paid for by Greitens for Missouri, Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer
4579 Laclede Avenue #138
St. Louis, Missouri 63108
Eric is a former member of the United States Navy having served four deployments overseas. Use of his military rank, titles and photographs in uniform does not imply an endorsement from the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
This email was sent to dpwillis67+greitens@gmail.com. You can also follow us on [Facebook](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=5edb45662d&e=84041254e6) and [Twitter](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=827bf596a9&e=84041254e6). Emails are one of the best ways to stay connected with the campaign. If they become too much, you can [unsubscribe](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=3f71c40094&e=84041254e6&c=ba4a0bf94a), but please let us know how we can improve. You can always reach us at [team@ericgreitens.com](mailto:team@ericgreitens.com) or (314) 899-0288. You're still reading the fineprint? You must be a detail oriented, all-around awesome person who is a big supporter — you should [volunteer](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=37bb072da8&e=84041254e6) with us!

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: I need your help, everyone
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hello there,
When I talk to Granite Staters, they tell me what matters to them -- ensuring good paying jobs, making college more affordable, and protecting health care. That's what I've worked to do as Governor, and I promise that's what I'll continue to do as a Senator.
But bringing our fight to the Senate won't just happen. If we're going to win this election, we have to talk to our neighbors, make phone calls, and hit every single fundraising goal. We're facing one of our very last FEC deadlines tonight, and right now we're short of our fundraising goal. I asked the team what I could do to help, and they suggested I reach out to you directly.
You and I both know that so much rides on the outcome of this race. This is one of our final FEC deadlines, and I need your help to make our $75,000 goal to stay on track and win on Election Day. **[Please, give $3 or more now to help get the Senate working for our families.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdb99/2a380d31/17e816c6/fc74c4/1062204031/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMDE5X0ZFQy1NV0hfbmgtbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20161019_FEC-MWH_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**
Washington corporate special interests are doing everything they can to shut down this campaign -- they've spent $47 million to keep me out of office and the Senate in GOP hands (no wonder I'm the only candidate in this race who wants to overturn _Citizens United_). All that money has kept us deadlocked in the polls, but I believe that with your help we can pull ahead.
There's too much at stake for you and the families I talk to every day for us not to fight our hearts out right here at the end. Please, give $3 or more now to help us hit this crucial goal, take back the Senate for hard-working families, and make progress for the middle class:
**[http://maggiehassan.com/Our-Fight](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdb99/2a380d31/17e816c6/fc74c4/1062204031/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMDE5X0ZFQy1NV0hfbmgtbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20161019_FEC-MWH_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan
[Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdb99/2a380d31/17e816c6/fc74c4/1062204031/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMDE5X0ZFQy1NV0hfbmgtbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20161019_FEC-MWH_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdb99/2a380d31/17e816c6/fc74c5/1062204031/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

name: Aisling Kerins
subject: Next debate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington __
body:
Can you show you have Jay's back? | [](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=OTcyMzI4MgS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAyMTU0MDk1NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Dear Friend, Jay's getting ready to go on stage for his big debate at Columbia Basin College in the Tri-Cities. Jay has an important job tonight: To share his vision for an economy that works for every Washington family, a healthier Washington for our kids and grandkids, and a state that welcomes all those who seek a better life for their families. **Jay understands the challenges facing us -- he also knows the fundamental optimism and "can-do" spirit of Washingtonians when we work together for the common good. And he's fired up to share those ideals on the debate stage.** The contrast between Jay and his opponent will be crystal clear. Republican Bill Bryant is pessimistic about our state's future. He wants us to go back on the progress we've made together. And I'm sure Bill Bryant will do all he can tonight to attack Jay and his vision of our state. [**So I need to ask: With so much at stake, can you make a quick donation to let Jay know you have his back as he stands up to Bill Bryant 's attacks tonight?**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=OTcyMzI4MgS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAyMTU0MDk1NwS2&mt=1&rt=0) I know I couldn't be more proud of the progress we're making in Washington. I hope you agree. Jay will sure appreciate knowing he has your support tonight. Thanks! Aisling Kerins
Campaign Director | [**CONTRIBUTE »**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=OTcyMzI4MgS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAyMTU0MDk1NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)

subject: Sue Minter WOULD Sign A Carbon Tax!
body:
| | |
---
[View this email in your browser](http://us13.campaign-archive1.com/?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=c04601b426&e=19cebfe173)
---
| |
---

---|---
| | [](http://us13.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=c04601b426&e=19cebfe173) | [Forward to a Friend](http://us13.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=c04601b426&e=19cebfe173)
---|---
| **The Truth Comes Out: Sue Minter _WOULD_ Sign a Carbon Tax as Governor ... She Just Doesn’t Want You to Know**
---
| Greetings,
---
| The evidence is overwhelming. For months **Sue Minter** has been saying she supports a “regional” carbon tax that could add as much as $.88 to a gallon of gas and heating fuel. She has also promised to implement a so-called ‘cap and trade’ scheme on transportation fuels, which added $.11 to every gallon of gas in California (where, incidentally, she has received almost 20% of her contributions from).
Here she is in her own words:
* “Democratic candidate **Sue Minter** , the former secretary of the Vermont Agency of Transportation, said she would be interested in a regional carbon tax... (Source: The Burlington Free Press, November 5, 2015)
* "**Sue Minter , **the state's former transportation secretary, said a regional (carbon tax) might make sense down the road.” (Source: Rutland Herald, November 8, 2015)

Now, **Sue Minter **wants us to believe she doesn’t support a Carbon Tax, unless it’s “regional” – as if making the scope of the new tax larger was somehow a good idea for the state or regional economy thousands of Vermonters and employers rely on.

But, last night in the WCAX debate **Sue Minter **was asked point-blank: “Will you sign a carbon tax into law as governor?”

**Sue Minter’s **answer was astonishingly deceptive. First she tried to dodge the question, then when pressed by Phil to answer whether she would sign it, or not ... Here’s EXACTLY what she said when pressed:

**“Well, I will see what it is that they’re talking about. There’s no bill in front of me to answer...” **(Source: WCAX Debate, Tuesday, October 8th, 2016)

We all know what her deflection really means: she will sign it, but isn’t willing to be honest about it because she knows Vermonters don’t support it.

**Sue Minter’s deceptive answer on the carbon tax stands in stark contrast to the consistency and clarity of Phil Scott who has said: “I don’t need a minute to answer this question. I will veto it.” **

The choice in this election is clear.
---

body:
I’m just getting off stage and we still have time before tonight’s final deadline. |

Friend, Tonight it was us against the world... And we won. We showed the world that our country can once again be run by the AMERICAN PEOPLE -- not the special interests, not the lobbyists, not the Washington bureaucrats. Friend, and as I’m stepping off the stage, I want to remind you that there is less than 1 hour and 30 minutes left until the FINAL FEC deadline of the entire election. Tonight’s deadline is our opportunity to show the media, to show Hillary, to show the WORLD what’s coming on November 8. Please make a contribution of $100, $65, $50, $35, $25, or $15 before the FINAL FEC deadline of the entire election to help us SURGE in the polls after tonight’s debate. The debates might be over, but the fight’s just getting started. The Clinton Cartel is going to bombard you with the nastiest lies and attacks you’ve ever seen. And the 24/7 media machine will back up every single one of her attacks, all while willfully turning a blind eye to her worst acts of corruption. We must stand our ground. We must cut through the noise to deliver our message straight to the American voter. The future of our country depends upon it. Please make a contribution of $100, $65, $50, $35, $25, or $15 before TONIGHT’s FINAL FEC deadline to help us SURGE in the polls. Thank you, Donald J. Trump CONTRIBUTE $100

clean_body: | | | | "" | Guys, I really didn't think I'd have to do this again. And to be honest, I'm getting tired of begging. But the reality is we have our very last FEC deadline of the election at midnight, and we're simply nowhere close to meeting our goal. We're not going to make it unless we get a surge of grassroots support. "" We need your help, everyone. We've met every FEC deadline goal we've set so far, and I'm not going to let this be the first time we fail. Otherwise our chances of defeating Marco Rubio -- and retaking the Senate -- are in trouble.
